subcodes.first_line: Whenever I make mention of Thee, O my God, in the prison, I witness all created things joining me in glorifying Thee, O Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلما اذکرک یا الهی فی السجن اشاهد بان کل الموجودات یسبحونک معی یا مالک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for nearness to God
